prompt: Create a polished anime-style promotional illustration in a Pokémon-inspired route featuring an elegant psychic-type female trainer as the central subject. She is a confident young woman with very long dark navy-black hair, straight bangs, violet-pink eyes, pale skin, and a calm, slightly aloof expression. She wears a sleek high-collared uniform dress with a dark navy upper section, deep burgundy fitted bodice and long asymmetrical coat panels, wide burgundy sleeve cuffs, small gold buttons, a thin gold chest bar, and a rounded gold belt ornament. Pose her in a dramatic three-quarter view from slightly below, one hand extended toward the viewer with foreshortened fingers, the other hand resting lightly near her chin, hair flowing across the frame as if moved by psychic energy. Include exactly two Pokémon-like companions: one pale lavender fox-cat psychic creature floating at the upper right with large ears, forked tail, forehead gem, and a soft serious gaze; one green-and-white elegant humanoid psychic creature at the lower left with a helmet-like green head shape, pink eyes, slim body, and a red chest fin, standing gracefully. Set the scene in a futuristic purple battle arena or city interior with glowing vertical panels, blurred neon structures, and a large circular emblem in the background on the left. Surround all characters with glowing violet-pink psychic energy, luminous rings, sparkles, floating particles, and soft magical light trails. Use dynamic diagonal composition, glossy cel-shaded anime rendering, crisp linework, highly detailed hair highlights, vibrant purple lighting, cinematic depth of field, and a premium trading-card illustration feel. The mood should be mysterious, powerful, elegant, and confident, with no visible text or watermark.
